product.name: Ar3İplik Moda Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Robocze modowe — stretch i polar, wielobrandowe
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fashion workwear — stretch and fleece, multi-brand
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Elasthane and Fleece Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Fleece Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
descriptions: Antistatic Fleece Knit Fabric 60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic fleece fabric. Ar3İplik Moda Pro fabric is used by oil and gas distribution drivers cloths. Chemical factories and cold zone flame retardant applications is another usage of the fabric.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
Ar3Iplik Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149-5
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Fleece Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
300 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612

evidence: technicalParameters: High Visibility | Done | EN ISO 20471
acceptedMatches.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 high-visibility standard and lists hi-vis as a core property, matching the explicit high-visibility apparel criteria.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: The product description explicitly states use for oil and gas distribution driver garments and carries certified electric-arc protection (EN 61482), directly matching the energy sector's inclusion of electric-arc protection and high-voltage/energy-distribution work.
No explicit medical or healthcare use stated despite antistatic and chemical protection properties.
Fabric is inherent FR and antistatic, which could theoretically suit welding-adjacent industrial heat exposure, but no explicit welding, foundry or metal-processing use is stated.

evidence: technicalParameters: High Visibility | Done | EN ISO 20471
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 high-visibility standard and lists hi-vis as a core property, making certified warning apparel its most specific and directly supported end use.

evidence: descriptions: 'used by oil and gas distribution drivers cloths. Chemical factories and cold zone flame retardant applications'
secondary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as general industrial protective workwear for oil & gas drivers and chemical factory use, matching general workwear/industrial apparel independent of the hi-vis certification.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Arc protection and oil/gas mention exist, but no explicit electrical utility or high-voltage installation use is stated; antistatic/arc alone is insufficient per rules.
No explicit welding, foundry or metal-processing use stated despite FR and antistatic properties.
No explicit medical or healthcare use stated.
